summary: Growth Engine - Complete testing of Travel Platform Growth Engine. All 32 backend API tests PASS (100%). Frontend renders correctly with 7 tabs (Funnel, Leads, Referrals, Customer Success, KPIs, Supplier Expansion, Growth Report). All features working: Agency Acquisition Funnel, Lead & Demo Management, Referral System (fraud prevention + rewards), Activation Metrics, Customer Success Dashboard, Onboarding Automation, Agency Segmentation, Supplier Expansion Model, Growth KPIs, and Full Growth Report (25 tasks, 15 risks).
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/growth/funnel - Returns 7 funnel stages with counts and conversion rates
GET /api/growth/leads - Lists all leads with stage filter support
POST /api/growth/leads - Creates new lead at 'lead_captured' stage
PUT /api/growth/leads/{lead_id}/stage - Updates lead stage (7 valid stages + churned)
GET /api/growth/demos - Lists demos
POST /api/growth/demos - Creates demo and updates lead stage to 'demo_scheduled'
PUT /api/growth/demos/{demo_id} - Updates demo, moves lead to 'demo_completed' when status=completed
GET /api/growth/referrals - Lists referrals with stats and reward_rules
POST /api/growth/referrals - Creates referral with fraud prevention (rejects duplicate emails)
PUT /api/growth/referrals/{referral_id}/status - Updates status, applies rewards (registered=10% discount, activated=50 EUR credit)
GET /api/growth/activation - Lists all agency activations with scores
GET /api/growth/activation/{agency_id} - Gets 5 milestones with weights totaling 100
POST /api/growth/activation/{agency_id}/event - Records activation events, prevents duplicates
GET /api/growth/customer-success - Dashboard with agency categories (active, dormant, at_risk, failed_connections, zero_bookings) and success playbook
GET /api/growth/onboarding/{agency_id} - 8-item checklist with progress tracking
POST /api/growth/onboarding/{agency_id}/complete - Marks tasks complete with timestamp
GET /api/growth/segments - Enterprise (50+ bookings), Growth (10-49), Starter (1-9), Inactive (0)
GET /api/growth/supplier-requests - Lists supplier expansion requests sorted by priority_score
POST /api/growth/supplier-requests - Creates new or increments demand_count for existing
PUT /api/growth/supplier-requests/{request_id} - Updates status and priority_score
GET /api/growth/kpis - Comprehensive KPIs with period filter (default 30 days)
GET /api/growth/report - Full report with growth_maturity_score, dimension_scores, 25 tasks (P0/P1/P2), 15 risks (high/medium/low)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 7 tabs render correctly, all buttons and forms functional)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests create TEST_ prefixed data (leads, referrals, supplier requests, activation events) for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Growth Engine fully tested. Key features: 1) GrowthEnginePage at /app/admin/growth-engine with 7 tabs, 2) Funnel shows acquisition funnel with 7 stages (lead_captured → activated), 3) Leads tab has create form with data-testid='lead-form' and stage selector dropdowns, 4) Referrals tab shows stats, reward rules (registered=10% discount, activated=50 EUR credit), and fraud prevention rejects duplicate emails, 5) Customer Success shows agency categories and success playbook, 6) KPIs tab shows metrics cards and agency segmentation (enterprise/growth/starter/inactive), 7) Supplier Expansion has request form and demand counting, 8) Growth Report shows maturity score (6.36/10), 25 implementation tasks with P0/P1/P2 priorities, and 15 risks with high/medium/low severity. All data persisted in MongoDB collections: growth_leads, growth_demos, growth_referrals, growth_activation_events, growth_onboarding_tasks, growth_supplier_requests.
